goal: polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, n) = polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, m)
polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, n) = polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, m)
polynomial_support_bounded_by[R](p, m) implies value = polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, m)

p.c: function(x0: Nat) { not polynomial_support_bounded_by[R](p, x0) or polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, x0) = value }(m)

goal: value = value and forall(x0: Nat) { polynomial_support_bounded_by[R](p, x0) implies value = polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, x0) }

p.c: exists(k0: Nat) { polynomial_support_bounded_by[R](p, k0) and polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, k0) != value }
let w0: Nat satisfy { polynomial_support_bounded_by[R](p, w0) and polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, w0) != value }
function(x0: Nat) { not polynomial_support_bounded_by[R](p, x0) or polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, x0) = value }(w0)

goal: exists(k0: R) { k0 = value and forall(x0: Nat) { polynomial_support_bounded_by[R](p, x0) implies k0 = polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, x0) } }
exists(k0: R) { forall(x0: Nat) { polynomial_support_bounded_by[R](p, x0) implies k0 = polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, x0) } }

p.c: exists(k0: R) { k0 = value and forall(x0: Nat) { not polynomial_support_bounded_by[R](p, x0) or polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, x0) = k0 } }
let w0: R satisfy { w0 = value and forall(x0: Nat) { not polynomial_support_bounded_by[R](p, x0) or polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, x0) = w0 } }
(forall(x0: Nat) { not polynomial_support_bounded_by[R](p, x0) or polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, x0) = w0 } = true)
(forall(x0: Nat) { not (polynomial_support_bounded_by[R](p, x0) and polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, x0) != w0) })
function(x0: R) { not forall(x1: Nat) { not polynomial_support_bounded_by[R](p, x1) or polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, x1) = x0 } }(w0)
function[T0: Semiring](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: Nat, x2: T0) { not polynomial_support_bounded_by[T0](x0, x1) or polynomial_eval[T0](x0, x2) = polynomial_eval_bound[T0](x0, x2, x1) }[R](p, n, x)
function[T0: Semiring](x0: T0, x1: T0) { polynomial_eval_bound[T0](Polynomial.constant[T0](x0), x1, 0.suc) = x0 }[R](r, x)

goal: polynomial_eval(p + q, x) = polynomial_eval_bound(p + q, x, m)
polynomial_eval(p + q, x) = polynomial_eval(p, x) + polynomial_eval(q, x)

p.c: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { not x0 < x1 or not x1 < x0 }(n, m)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0 < x1 or x1 <= x0 }(m, n)

goal: polynomial_eval(p + q, x) = polynomial_eval_bound(p + q, x, n)
polynomial_eval(p + q, x) = polynomial_eval(p, x) + polynomial_eval(q, x)
polynomial_eval(p + -p, x) = polynomial_eval(p, x) + polynomial_eval(-p, x)

p.c: function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0) { x0 + -x0 = T0.0 }[R](polynomial_eval(p, x))

goal: polynomial_eval(p, x) + polynomial_eval(-p, x) = polynomial_eval(p, x) + -polynomial_eval(p, x)

p.c: function[T0: Ring](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: Polynomial[T0]) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[R](p, q)

goal: polynomial_eval(p + -q, x) = polynomial_eval(p, x) + polynomial_eval(-q, x)
polynomial_eval(p, x) - polynomial_eval(q, x) = polynomial_eval(p, x) + -polynomial_eval(q, x)

p.c: function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[R](polynomial_eval(p, x), polynomial_eval(q, x))

goal: polynomial_eval(p.sub(q), x) = polynomial_eval(p, x) - polynomial_eval(q, x)
